displayTitle: R2-D2 and BB-8 Chased By A Bounty Hunter?!
synopsis: The droids take a walk to the store and have no idea a bounty hunter is hot on their trail trying to capture them! Lucky for them, he’s not a very good bounty hunter…will any of his attempts to capture them succeed?
title: R2-D2 and BB-8 Chased By A Bounty Hunter?!
